camera_notes: Elevated wide-angle deck camera. Multiple lanes visible. Suitable for body line, wake pattern, stroke phase timing, arm width relative to shoulders, and hip-level assessment. NOT suitable for precise elbow angle, wrist rotation, hand pitch, or chin position.

flagged_timestamps.fault_summary: Lane 1 BAD: catch too wide, hands/elbows past shoulder line. Lane 2 GOOD: clean arm recovery, elbows in front of shoulders.
Lane 1 BAD: hips beginning to drop below surface, early seesaw forming. Lane 3 GOOD: controlled downward drive after breath, hips at waterline.
Lane 3 GOOD: body staying horizontal, hips at waterline, head not rising excessively.
Lane 4 GOOD: elbows high, early vertical forearm established before pull begins.
Both lanes GOOD: minimal chin rise during breath keeps hips from dropping into seesaw pattern.
Both lanes GOOD: strong catch with early vertical forearm, elbows high before pull initiates.
